ns0:entry.ns0:title: Effect-TS/effect-smol
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol
Language: typescript
Core libraries and experimental work for Effect v4

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Heroic-Games-Launcher/HeroicGamesLauncher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Heroic-Games-Launcher/HeroicGamesLauncher
Language: typescript
A games launcher for GOG, Amazon and Epic Games for Linux, Windows and macOS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
Language: typescript
The Secure CommsOS™ for mission-critical operations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
Language: typescript
A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudflare/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudflare/agents
Language: typescript
Build and deploy AI Agents on Cloudflare

ns0:entry.ns0:title: devlikeapro/waha
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/devlikeapro/waha
Language: typescript
WAHA - WhatsApp HTTP API (REST API) that you can configure in a click! 3 engines: WEBJS (browser based), NOWEB (websocket nodejs), GOWS (websocket go)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli
Language: typescript
An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laurent22/joplin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laurent22/joplin
Language: typescript
Joplin - the privacy-focused note taking app with sync capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lobehub/lobehub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub
Language: typescript
The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: typescript
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: triggerdotdev/trigger.dev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/triggerdotdev/trigger.dev
Language: typescript
Trigger.dev – build and deploy fully‑managed AI agents and workflows
